fields.helpText: The first date the DRG order of precedence is effective.  Generally this  would be effective date of the DRG Grouper version.
The last date the DRG order of precedence is effective.  Generally this  would be one day before the effective date of the next DRG Grouper version  that modifies the order.
This is the list of all DRGs active in the date range in hierarchical  order of use or precedence.  Used as the basis to select the final DRG for  an event if more than one is possible.
